name: markpad-settings-modal-resize-close-bug
title: Markpad: fix settings modal resize and accidental close
original_prompt:
$adhoc-sdlc plan i exec
Okienku ustawień. Generalnie jakoś dziwnie się rozszerza tak jak ja bym ciągnął w jakąś tam stronę lewy czy dolny róg tak to to się rozszerza jako całość dziwnie to wygląda. Poza tym jak puszczę mysz to znika. Okno ustawień znika.

entries.note: Started execution. Root cause: native CSS resize on a flex-centered modal makes resizing look centered, and the post-resize click can reach the backdrop close handler.

Added a regression test for settings modal resize. RED verified: scripts/toolbarCustomizationWiring.test.ts fails because the component still uses native resize and lacks the dedicated resize handle/backdrop guard.
Replaced native CSS resize with a dedicated bottom-right pointer resize handle. The modal freezes its top-left position during resize and ignores the synthetic backdrop click after pointer release.
Cleaned up the settings modal markup indentation after the CoVe diff pass; behavior unchanged, but final builds must be repeated after this source edit.

verification.command: npm run check; npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts
verification.outcome: PASS: npm run check completed with 0 errors and 0 warnings. PASS: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts completed with 52 passing tests.

verification.command: npm run build; rg -n 'warning|Warning|WARN|error:' /tmp/markpad-settings-resize-frontend-build.log; git diff --check
verification.outcome: PASS: npm run build completed with exit code 0. Log scan found no warning/Warning/WARN/error: entries. PASS: git diff --check reported no whitespace errors.

verification.command: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci; sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt; file release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe
verification.outcome: PASS: Windows x64 cargo-xwin release build completed with exit code 0. Log scan found no warning/Warning/WARN/error: entries. PASS: refreshed release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe; SHA256SUMS.txt validates and file reports PE32+ executable GUI x86-64 for MS Windows.

verification.command: npm run check; npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts; npm run build; npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci; sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt
verification.outcome: PASS: final npm run check completed with 0 errors and 0 warnings. PASS: final npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts completed with 52 passing tests. final_result: Done. Settings modal now uses a dedicated bottom-right resize handle instead of native CSS resize, keeps the modal top-left anchored during resize, and guards the backdrop close handler from the post-resize click. Windows portable release artifact refreshed at release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe.
